description_long: This object is a medium-sized book with a hard, deep red cover and visible white pages. The cover is plain, lacking any visible illustration or decorative elements, and the spine is similarly unadorned. The book is shown both closed and open, revealing a gentle curve in the open pages, which are blank and light gray in color. The edges of the pages are clean and uniform, and the book appears to be of standard thickness, suitable for a novel or textbook. The overall design is simple and functional, with no visible embellishments or text. The book's construction suggests it is intended for regular handling and reading.
description: A medium-sized, hard-covered book with a plain deep red exterior and clean white pages, shown both closed and open. The design is simple, with no visible illustrations or text.
description_view_0: The left side shows the book closed with a plain red cover, while the right side displays the book open, revealing blank white pages.
description_view_1: Both books are viewed from the top, highlighting the flat red cover of the closed book and the curved, open pages of the other.
description_view_2: The open book is on the left, showing the gentle curve of the blank pages, while the closed book on the right displays its solid red cover and white page edges.
description_view_3: The closed book is viewed from the back, showing a solid red surface, while the open book is seen from the top, emphasizing the spread of the blank pages.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is plain red with no visible text or decorative elements.
